parameters.content:
## SUB — Domain Discovery
**Trigger:** Execute Workflow
**Input:** `{ lead_id, company_id, company_name, ico }`
**Output:** `{ found: true/false, domain: "example.cz", source: "ares|firmy|dns|ddg" }`

Tries 4 sources in order: ARES BE (if ICO), Firmy.cz, DNS probe (.cz/.com), DuckDuckGo.
Stops at first success.
